description: Execute V0.7 Documentation Enrichment: Deepen and expand the bilingual documentation portal to match the comprehensive content level of Deer-Flow.
scope: 1. Expand CORE_CONCEPTS.md and ARCHITECTURE.md with deep-dive technical explanations of the state machine, artifact lifecycle, and dual-track gating. 2. Expand USAGE.md and TEAM_COLLABORATION.md with concrete, step-by-step examples (e.g., actual JSON payload examples, CLI commands). 3. Create a dedicated EXTENSION.md or advanced usage guide explaining how to build custom adapters. 4. Ensure all documents have professional, multi-level headers, warning callouts, and comprehensive Mermaid diagrams. Use SubAgent-TechWriter via delegate_task.
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of .agent-state/ physical migrations. NO modifications to the MCP server logic or source code. NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json or iteration-state.json state models. NO new product features.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify any file outside allowed_files.
Attempting to write implementation code in src/.
Executing without an approved docs-enrichment contract.
